This table summarizes the key characteristics and Quality Control (QC) results for a Digital Height Model (DHM) product for Milano, Italy. The DHM was created by COTESA, with external QC performed by KPGeo and reviewed by Kamil Grudzień on 22/09/2021. The product, identified as IT002Lx\_MILANO\_UA2012\_DHM, covers an area of 647.08 sq. km based on Satellite Imagery. The overall product acceptance is "Yes" with a declared product quality level of "Very High".
